architect_decision_intent: Consider Button for an explicit CTA while preserving nested-clickable topology as an unresolved risk.
use_when_applied: The node is a call to action or explicit click target.
Interaction topology can be proven safe.
avoid_when_considered: It would create nested clickable topology.
decision_questions_answered: Clickable ancestor and descendant evidence is not yet closed.
The card does not prove the target action URL or behavior.
unresolved_risks: A linked ancestor may make this candidate invalid unless CE proves safe topology.
limitations: The Button card informs the candidate boundary; it does not prove the correct design choice or Builder-safe action.
proof_gap_acknowledgements: CE must check interaction topology before closure.
